name: AI Home Agent
_comment: Privacy-first AI automation for your home
_aiUsageFrequency_options: minimal (rule-based mostly) | moderate (learn patterns) | frequent (active AI)

automation._multiSensorFusion_note: Requires multiple rear sensors before alerting (reduces false alarms from small animals)

zoneConfig._comment: Example zones - customize these for your home
zoneConfig.name: Living Room
zoneConfig.devices: living room light, living room motion, living room outlet, living room thermostat

zoneConfig.name: Kitchen
zoneConfig.devices: kitchen light, kitchen motion, kitchen outlet

zoneConfig.name: Master Bedroom
zoneConfig.devices: master light, master motion, master thermostat, master outlet

zoneConfig.name: Basement
zoneConfig.devices: basement light, basement motion, basement thermostat

zoneConfig.name: Rear Yard
zoneConfig.devices: rear motion 1, rear motion 2, rear motion 3, rear light
zoneConfig._note: Multiple motion sensors - multi-sensor fusion will require 2+ to trigger alert

zoneConfig.name: Front Yard
zoneConfig.devices: front motion, front light, driveway motion, driveway light

_debug_note: Set to true for detailed logging during setup
